title: Sensor assembly
abstract: A sensor assembly is described comprising a thermowell projecting portion having an internal wall defining a well cavity; at least one temperature sensor positioned to measure the temperature of the well cavity; at least one accelerometer sensor positioned inside the well cavity. A conduit for a process fluid having an elongate conduit wall surroundingly defining a conduit flow channel and such a sensor assembly fitted to an aperture in the conduit wall such that the thermowell projecting portion extends into the conduit flow channel is also described.
claims:
Claims 1. A sensor assembly comprising: a thermowell projecting portion having a wall defining a well cavity; at least one temperature sensor positioned to measure the temperature of the well cavity; at least one accelerometer sensor positioned inside the well cavity. 2. A sensor assembly in accordance with claim 1 further comprising an external housing portion that defines a housing volume continuous with the well cavity. 3. A sensor assembly in accordance with claim 1 or claim 2 wherein the thermowell projecting portion defines a well cavity in that it comprises a tubular wall with a closed tip at a distal end. 4. A sensor assembly in accordance with claim 3 wherein the tubular wall defines a tube of reducing diameter towards the tip. 5. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim wherein the at least one accelerometer sensor is positioned at least a major part of the distance distally into the well cavity. 6. A sensor assembly in accordance with claim 5 wherein the at least one accelerometer sensor is position at a distal end of the well cavity. 7. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim including at least one accelerometer sensor positioned so as to be aligned in use in-line to a fluid flow to be measured. 8. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim configured so as to be orientated in an in-use direction when inserted into an aperture in an elongate conduit that is such that at least one accelerometer sensor within the well cavity is aligned in a conduit elongate direction corresponding to a direction in-line to a fluid flow to be measured in the conduit. 

 A sensor assembly in accordance with claim 7 or 8 wherein the well cavity of the thermowell projecting portion includes at least two accelerometer sensors positioned so as to be aligned in use in-line to a fluid flow to be measured. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim wherein the well cavity of the thermowell projecting portion includes at least two accelerometer sensors having orthogonal sensor directions. A sensor assembly in accordance with claim 10 wherein the well cavity of the thermowell projecting portion includes at least two accelerometer sensors having a sensor direction aligned in use in-line to a fluid flow to be measured and at least one further accelerometer sensor aligned in use transverse to a fluid flow to be measured. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim comprising an engagement portion for engagement into an aperture in a conduit wall. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim wherein the temperature sensor is positioned inside the well cavity. A sensor assembly in accordance with claim 13 wherein the temperature sensor is in contact with an internal wall surface of the wall of the thermowell projecting portion towards a distal end thereof. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim wherein the thermowell projecting is fabricated from a thermally conductive material. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim wherein the thermowell projecting portion is a metallic material. A sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim wherein the or each accelerometer sensor is an unpowered direct effect piezoelectric transducer. A conduit for a process fluid comprising: 

 an elongate conduit wall defining a conduit flow channel; a sensor assembly in accordance with any preceding claim; wherein the sensor assembly is fitted to an aperture in the conduit wall such that the thermowell projecting portion extends into the conduit flow channel. A conduit in accordance with claim 18 wherein the sensor assembly comprises an external housing portion that defines a housing volume continuous with the well cavity, the thermowell projecting portion projects into a conduit defined by the conduit, and the external housing portion is disposed externally of the conduit and defines a housing volume continuous with the well cavity. A conduit in accordance with claim 18 or 19 wherein the sensor assembly is fitted in such orientation that at least one accelerometer sensor within the well cavity is aligned in a conduit elongate direction. A conduit in accordance with one of claims 18 to 20 comprising a plurality of sensor assemblies arrayed along the length of the conduit.
